title: Token endpoint now requires PKCE for public clients
raw_changelog: Starting April 1, 2026, the /oauth/token endpoint requires PKCE (code_verifier) for all public clients.
before_text:
## Token Endpoint

POST /oauth/token

### Public Clients
Public clients (no client_secret) can exchange authorization codes without PKCE.

```
POST /oauth/token
{
  "grant_type": "authorization_code",
  "client_id": "xxx",
  "code": "abc",
  "redirect_uri": "https://app.example.com/callback"
}
```
after_text:
## Token Endpoint

POST /oauth/token

### Public Clients
Public clients (no client_secret) MUST include PKCE parameters when exchanging authorization codes.

```
POST /oauth/token
{
  "grant_type": "authorization_code",
  "client_id": "xxx",
  "code": "abc",
  "redirect_uri": "https://app.example.com/callback",
  "code_verifier": "dBjftJeZ4CVP-mB92K27uhbUJU1p1r_wW1gFWFOEjXk"
}
```

**Breaking Change (April 1, 2026):** Requests without code_verifier will return 400 Bad Request.
diff_text:
--- before
+++ after
@@ -4,12 +4,15 @@
 ### Public Clients
-Public clients (no client_secret) can exchange authorization codes without PKCE.
+Public clients (no client_secret) MUST include PKCE parameters.
 
 POST /oauth/token
 {
   ...
-  "redirect_uri": "https://app.example.com/callback"
+  "redirect_uri": "https://app.example.com/callback",
+  "code_verifier": "dBjftJeZ4CVP-mB92K27uhbUJU1p1r_wW1gFWFOEjXk"
 }
+
+**Breaking Change (April 1, 2026):** Requests without code_verifier will return 400 Bad Request.

ground_truth.breaking_reason: code_verifier becomes required. Public clients not using PKCE will get 400 errors.
ground_truth.action_required: Implement PKCE flow in all public clients. Add code_challenge to authorization requests and code_verifier to token requests. Deadline: April 1, 2026.
ground_truth.confidence_notes: Clear breaking change with new required parameter
